CustomObject.description: Per-agency median litigation duration table from CourtListener Stage 14 pipeline (71M-row docket analysis). Used by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer to populate Litigation_Duration_Cost__c on IndividualApplication and to display expected litigation duration in the Risk Intelligence card. Duration is INDEPENDENT of outcome (agency-won median 15.1 mo ≈ challenger-won 16.3 mo) — treat as cost proxy only, not a win-probability signal.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Agency Duration Cost

fields.description: Abbreviation used as lookup key matching nepa_lead_agency__c on IndividualApplication (e.g., BLM, USACE, USFWS). DEFAULT record is the global fallback.
fields.label: Agency Key

fields.description: Median litigation duration in months for NEPA cases filed against this agency, from CourtListener Stage 14 analysis. Range: BOEM 6.5 months (min) to FTA 33.4 months (max). Global median fallback: 15.4 months.
fields.label: Median Duration (Months)

fields.description: Litigation_Duration_Cost normalized to [0,1] using formula: (median_months - 6.5) / (33.4 - 6.5). Written to IndividualApplication.nepa_litigation_duration_cost__c by the Risk Scorer flow. Weighted at 15% in the v3 composite score formula.
fields.label: Normalized Duration Cost

fields.description: Short description of the litigation pathway that explains this agency's median duration. Appended to the risk score factors string in the format: Expected litigation duration: ~X months (pathway note). Example: APA district court / summary judgment track.
fields.label: Pathway Note

fields.description: When false, this agency duration record is excluded from Risk Scorer lookups. SubscriberControlled so agencies can override with local data.
fields.label: Active
